meta.title: Dale Peterson Interviews Brian Scott on ONCD
meta.description:
A fireside chat on the S4x24 Main Stage. Dale asks Brian Scott about:

- the overlap between the various federal organizations and what role the Office of the National Cyber Director does to address disagreements, conflicts, etc.

- the annual review of the implementation of the National Cybersecurity Strategy to create version 2.0.

- will 2.0 be more results focused and have metrics?

- what sectors have gaps in authority to implement cybersecurity regulations?

- how should an asset owner deal with the deluge of information and guidance coming out from the US Government?

- the IoT security labeling program, secure Internet routing, OT in space, ...

- should a S4 attendee interact with ONCD?
